subject: [PATCH v7 09/20] nfsd: add data structures for handling CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds data structures and functionality to support directory delegation CB_NOTIFY in the NFSv4 protocol. It introduces two new structs, nfsd_notify_event and nfsd4_cb_notify, which carry fsnotify events and per-delegation state for notification handling, respectively. The patch also refactors alloc_init_deleg into a common function with a pluggable sc_free callback and adds alloc_init_dir_deleg to allocate necessary resources for CB_NOTIFY encoding. Additionally, it sets up skeleton nfsd4_cb_notify_ops with done/release handlers that will be filled in when the notification path is wired up.
